news.headline: Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT) to report Q3 2024 results on November 6, 2024. Updated information on financial performance.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, London-based company Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT), known for its innovative intelligence solutions, revealed plans to release its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Wednesday, November 6, 2024, before the market opens. This report will provide stakeholders and investors with crucial insights into the company's recent financial performance and strategic direction.

news.headline: Floridians prefer climate-conscious candidates, 52% more likely to vote for them: FAU survey.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by FAU revealed that the majority of residents in Florida prefer candidates who prioritize addressing climate change. According to the survey results, 52% of respondents are more inclined to vote for candidates who have a record of taking action on climate issues. This data underscores the importance of climate change as a deciding factor in political elections for Floridians. The survey, conducted in October 2024 in Boca Raton, Florida, highlights the significance of environmental policies and actions in shaping public opinion and electoral outcomes in the state.

news.headline: ACTO launches LAICA RepAssist™, 1st GenAI Knowledge Assistant for Life Sciences. Improves HCP interactions, provides instant information.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance interactions with healthcare professionals (HCPs), ACTO has introduced a new Intelligent Field Excellence (IFE) platform that offers field professionals immediate access to approved clinical and product information. This development is geared towards transforming the way HCPs engage with the life sciences industry. The platform, which utilizes artificial intelligence, was launched on October 16, 2024, and is a collaboration between TORONTO and NEW YORK. This initiative aims to streamline information dissemination and ensure that HCPs have the most up-to-date and accurate data at their fingertips.

news.headline: Prop Tech Startup Lamarr.AI secures $1.1M pre-seed funding from Hazelview Ventures, milemark•capital, and Newlab for building diagnostics tech.
news.summary: Lamarr.AI, emerging from joint research at MIT and Georgia, receives support from Hazelview Ventures, milemark•capital, and Newlab as they lead in developing comprehensive building envelope diagnostics and retrofitting solutions. Established as pioneers in this field, Lamarr.AI secures backing from key investors, marking a significant step in their journey. The startup, founded on innovative technology and expert partnerships, sets the stage for transformative advancements in the construction sector.

news.headline: Oracle launches new service to simplify patient payments, reduce fees in healthcare facilities. Patients can settle co-pays easily with preferred payment method. AUSTIN, Texas, Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: A recently launched service in Austin, Texas, aims to streamline the payment process for healthcare providers by offering transparent and secure payment processing options for patients. Announced on October 16, 2024, this service provided by Oracle is designed to simplify the settlement of co-pays and account balances for patients, allowing them to utilize their preferred payment methods. This initiative is expected to significantly reduce processing time and improve efficiency in handling payments within the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Thompson Thrift wins 3 Top Workplaces Culture Excellence Awards for employee appreciation, well-being, professional development.
news.summary: Indianapolis-based company Thompson Thrift, a prominent real estate developer, received recognition for their commitment to employee appreciation, well-being, and professional growth. The accolade was received on October 16, 2024. Thompson Thrift is known as a top-tier real estate company with a national presence and is highly regarded in the industry.

news.headline: Health Foundation of South Florida allocates over $1 million in Q3 2024 to enhance health equity for children and Black men in Broward and Miami-Dade counties.
news.summary: In Miami on October 16, 2024, The Health Foundation of South Florida revealed their focus in the third quarter of 2024 on enhancing health outcomes for children and Black men in Broward and Miami-Dade counties. The foundation disclosed over $1 million in supplementary investments for this cause.

news.headline: Telehealth utilization decreased in July nationwide and in all US census regions. Acute respiratory diseases and infections dropped out of the top 5 diagnostic categories for the first time in 2024, with hypertension and joint/soft tissue diseases entering the top 5 nationally.
news.summary: In 2024, there has been a notable shift in telehealth diagnostic categories nationwide. Acute Respiratory Diseases and Infections, as well as Encounter for Examination, dropped out of the top five for the first time. Instead, Hypertension and Joint/Soft Tissue Diseases and Issues have emerged as new entries in the top five diagnostic categories nationwide. This change marks a significant development in the healthcare landscape, with a transition to focusing on different health concerns.

news.headline: BioMarin to host Q3 2024 financial results call on Oct 29 at 4:30pm ET with CEO Alexander Hardy.
news.summary: In San Rafael, California, on October 16, 2024, Biopharmaceutical company BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc. (NASDAQ: BMRN) disclosed that Alexander Hardy, their President and CEO, will be leading a conference call and webcast on Tuesday, October 29, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of the call is to review the company's performance for the third quarter.

news.headline: Ambercycle partners with Reformation to use cycora® in select pieces for the goal of circular business by 2030.
news.summary: Reformation, aiming to achieve circularity by 2030, will incorporate Ambercycle's cycora® regenerated polyester into specific items in its new collection. In an announcement dated October 16, 2024 from Los Angeles, the brand revealed this collaboration. Ambercycle, known for its innovative material science, will be contributing to Reformation's sustainability efforts.

news.headline: By 2034, 30M vehicles will have satellite connectivity, creating a big opportunity for automakers to monetize.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in London, the automotive industry is witnessing a trend where Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) and their partners are increasingly considering integrating satellite connectivity into vehicles. This move aims to enhance connectivity for subscribers, potentially boosting retention rates. This development is spurred by the desire to offer drivers a distinct and improved experience.

news.headline: Manulife/John Hancock host 2nd Longevity Symposium in Boston; Governor Healey among speakers.
news.summary: Governor Maura Healey of Massachusetts is set to participate as a speaker at the prestigious Longevity Symposium hosted by John Hancock and Manulife in Boston on October 16, 2024. This event marks the second symposium in the series, following a successful inaugural gathering in 2023. The symposium aims to address the theme of "Longer. Healthier. Better." and features a lineup of world-class speakers sharing insights and expertise. Attendees can expect valuable discussions on longevity and health strategies to promote overall well-being.

news.headline: US Export Prices MoM Actual -0.7% (Forecast -0.4%, Previous -0.7%)
US Import Prices MoM Actual -0.4% (Forecast -0.3%, Previous -0.3%)
Canadian Manufacturing Sales MoM Actual -1.3% (Forecast -1.5%, Previous 1.4%)
Qualcomm reportedly delaying decision on Intel acquisition until after US election.
Abbott Laboratories exceeds Q3 sales and earnings expectations, elevates full-year forecast.
San Leonardo wins 2025 "Winery of the Year" from Italy's Gambero Rosso, prestigious wine guide.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Rome, the renowned Italian wine guide Gambero Rosso honored San Leonardo, a winery in Trentino, as the 2025 "Winery of the Year." This recognition is a significant achievement in the Italian wine industry, underscoring the estate's exceptional quality and craftsmanship. Gambero Rosso is known for its rigorous evaluations and rankings of Italian wines, making this accolade highly prestigious. San Leonardo's dedication to producing outstanding wines has resulted in this prestigious award, highlighting their commitment to excellence.

news.headline: IFS unveils AI-driven product enhancements for oil & gas industry. IFS BOLO 15 includes AI automation for AP invoicing, enhancing efficiency and sustainability gains.
news.summary: The updated version of IFS BOLO 15 is set to provide exceptional back-office efficiency with the support of IFS.ai. This new release introduces AI automation for accounts payable invoicing functions, enhancing cash flow management. In addition, improvements to IFS Tobin and IFS iLandMan will streamline the brine leasing process to facilitate the transition to a more efficient system.

news.headline: HealthSnap partners with Capital Cardiology for Principal Care Management, expanding virtual care platform for health systems.
news.summary: HealthSnap has expanded its Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) and Chronic Care Management (CCM) platform through a recent partnership, establishing the most inclusive virtual care management platform in the healthcare industry. The collaboration was announced on October 16, 2024, in Miami. As a prominent virtual care management entity, HealthSnap is currently collaborating with more than 150 health institutions, further solidifying its presence in the sector.

news.headline: Alcoa Corporation sets $0.10 quarterly cash dividend per share on common and preferred stock; to be paid on November 15, 2024.
news.summary: PITTSBURGH--Alcoa Corporation has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share of common stock and Series A convertible preferred stock. The dividend will be paid on November 15, 2024, to stockholders of record as of October 29, 2024. Alcoa, a global industry leader in bauxite, alumina, and aluminum products, trades on NYSE under the symbols AA and ASX under AAI. Their vision is to reinvent the industry.

news.headline: Taiwan shines in tech sector amid global trends, leading in innovation & growth: Bloomberg opinion.
Upcoming virtual research day on Oct 30, 2024 by Wave Life Sciences to showcase RNA medicines, WVE-006 for AATD, and WVE-007 for obesity.
news.summary: The upcoming event will showcase WVE-006 for AATD and Wave's fast-progressing pipeline of RNA medications. It will also unveil new RNA editing programs and share fresh preclinical data for WVE-007 INHBE program targeting obesity. The event aims to highlight these developments and advancements in Wave's RNA medicine portfolio.

news.headline: USDT adoption skyrockets with 330M on-chain wallets by Q3 2024, highlighting global impact as a digital asset.
news.summary: Tether.io has reported that the number of on-chain wallets utilizing Tether's USDT has surpassed 330 million as of the third quarter of 2024. This significant adoption underscores the widespread influence of USDT as a digital asset on a global scale.

news.headline: Interplay Learning's SAM named top tech innovation of 2024 by IACET. SAM is the first AI assistant for technicians in the field.
news.summary: A prestigious skilled trades training provider based in Austin, Texas, recently received the coveted Innovation of the Year Award from a renowned CTE organization. The award was granted for their groundbreaking Technology Integration for SAM, an AI assistant tailored for technicians working in the field. Named Skill Advisor and Mentor (SAM), this innovative tool is the first of its kind and has garnered significant attention in the industry. The award was presented on October 16, 2024, marking a milestone achievement for Interplay Learning and their cutting-edge technology aimed at enhancing the skills and performance of field technicians.

news.headline: Mintel predicts 4 food trends for 2025. GLP-1 drugs will shape industry.
news.summary: Today, Mintel, a leading authority on consumer preferences, unveiled four major trends set to impact the food and beverage sector globally in the upcoming years. Looking ahead to 2025 and beyond, the industry will witness a heightened emphasis on GLP-1 weight-loss medications, bringing essential attention to this significant development.

news.headline: Designable Fashion releases brand launch guide to empower fashion startups and students. Miami, Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Designable Fashion has established itself as a trusted source for aspiring fashion entrepreneurs, startups, and students seeking to enter the fashion industry. Providing valuable industry insights, the company has quickly gained a reputation as a go-to resource. The initiative, based in Miami, was launched on Oct. 16, 2024. Its mission is to offer aspiring designers the knowledge and resources they need to succeed in the competitive fashion world.

news.headline: The Big Biscuit focuses on sustainable growth led by father-and-son Co-CEOs. Named one of 5 Breakout Brands, secure spot on Franchise 400 list.
news.summary: In Prairie Village, Kansas, The Big Biscuit®, a popular All-American breakfast and lunch franchise, is experiencing significant growth under the leadership of Co-CEOs David and Chad Offerdahl. Known for their classic comfort food and genuine hometown hospitality, the company has been recognized as one of the top 5 Breakout Brands by Franchise Times. They have also earned a spot on the prestigious Franchise 400 list for the first time this year. The success of The Big Biscuit® is evident as they continue to expand and receive accolades in the competitive franchise industry.

news.headline: Imgix introduces AI object removal tool & expands AI editing suite, empowering users with smarter visual editing.
news.summary: Imgix, a pioneering company in visual media optimization, has revealed its latest innovation in San Francisco on October 16, 2024. They have introduced a cutting-edge intelligent object removal tool as a part of their integrated suite of AI solutions. This new tool aims to empower users by providing smarter and faster visual editing capabilities. The release of this tool signifies Imgix's commitment to revolutionize the field of visual media with advanced technologies.

news.headline: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu surge due to social media hype, Dogecoin at $0.1256 (+11.2%), Shiba Inu at $0.00001875 (+5.2%).
news.summary: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) have seen significant surges in the past 24 hours, with Dogecoin benefiting from Elon Musk potentially leading a “D.O.G.E” department. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: - Dogecoin is at $0.1256 with a market cap of $18.386 billion, showing a 24-hour trend increase of 11.2% and a 7-day trend increase of 15.1%.- Shiba Inu is priced at $0.00001875 with a market cap of $11.04 billion, experiencing a 5.2% increase in the last 24 hours and a 7.2% increase over 7 days.- The newly emerged Department Of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E) has hit $0.026 with a market cap of $25.68 million, demonstrating an impressive 122.4% surge in 24 hours and an outstanding 152.4% increase in a week. Market analysts are deliberating on the potential effects of a Trump victory in the upcoming U.S. presidential election on specific cryptocurrencies, especially those related to the “DOGE” theme. Andrew Kang points out that owning Dogecoin and other meme coins could be advantageous. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

Global Fluid Sensors Market projected to reach $27.65 billion by 2031, with a growth rate of 8.9% driven by IoT integration.
news.summary: The global Fluid Sensors Market, valued at 15.26 billion dollars in 2024, is expected to reach 27.65 billion dollars by 2031. The rise is fueled by increasing demand from industries like oil & gas, food & beverages, power generation, and others. Fluid sensors are crucial in monitoring various parameters for operational efficiency and safety. Market trends include the integration of IoT in sensors for remote monitoring, as well as the development of wearable and miniature sensors for versatile applications. The market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 8.9%, driven by automation demand and a focus on safety and quality control in industrial processes.

news.headline: Dubai Industrial City to highlight food security role at SIAL Paris, part of Dubai delegation, on Oct 19-23, 2024.
news.summary: Dubai Industrial City, a key manufacturing and logistics hub in the Middle East, will highlight the importance of food security. It is affiliated with TECOM Group PJSC and will participate in an event organized by the Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism from October 19-23, 2024, in Dubai, UAE.

news.headline: EQT-backed Indium buys majority stake in Experion, a global product engineering company in Cupertino & Chennai.
news.summary: In Cupertino, California, and Chennai, India, it was reported that Indium has recently finalized a deal to purchase a controlling interest in Experion. The acquisition involves a majority stake in Experion and marks a significant move in the business world. No specific financial details were disclosed in the announcement. This agreement signifies a strategic development in the realm of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: WiSA Technologies anticipates over 200% revenue growth in Q3 2024 as IP licensee starts product shipments.
news.summary: A company based in Beaverton, Oregon, WiSA Technologies, has made an early announcement regarding their third quarter in 2024, revealing a remarkable sequential revenue surge of more than 200%. This growth comes as WiSA E IP licensee initiates the shipping of their products.

news.headline: U.S. Bancorp Q3 earnings: EPS $1.03 (beat), revenue $6.864B (miss), $119M in investment losses. Shares up.
news.summary: U.S. Bancorp's (NYSE:USB) stock is up today as they announced their third-quarter results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.03, surpassing analysts' expectations of 99 cents. However, their quarterly revenues of $6.864 billion fell short of the projected $6.895 billion. In the third quarter, they experienced $119 million in net losses from investment securities sales (with a $89 million net-of-tax impact), although this was balanced by reduced income tax expenses due to specific tax settlements. The company noted a decrease in expenses compared to the previous year, which ultimately supported a slight positive increase in operating leverage.

news.headline: 23andMe completes 1-for-20 reverse stock split of Class A and Class B common stock, effective as of 12:01 a.m. EST on Oct 16, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in Sunnyvale, California, 23andMe Holding Co. (Nasdaq: ME), conducted a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its Class A and Class B common stock on October 16, 2024. The reverse stock split officially took effect at 12:01 a.m. EST on the same day.

news.headline: OPT to showcase Autonomous Vehicle Services with Unique Group at ADIPEC. Explore cutting-edge tech in Abu Dhabi. #ADIPEC #techexpo

Discover insights from Coinbase and Glassnode's Q4 report on rising institutional engagement and staking activity in crypto, with a focus on Bitcoin ETFs, Ethereum staking, and stablecoins. Explore now!
news.summary: Discover the most recent developments in the cryptocurrency markets from Glassnode and Coinbase's Q4 report. The report touches upon important trends such as Bitcoin ETFs, Ethereum staking, and stablecoins. Dig into the data to stay updated on the latest happenings in the crypto world.

news.headline: Novavax's COVID-19 and flu combo phase 3 trial halted by FDA on Oct. 16, 2024; Novavax, Inc. stock at Nasdaq: NVAX.
news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on October 16, 2024, Novavax, Inc. (Nasdaq: NVAX) revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has imposed a clinical hold on Novavax's Investigational New Drug. Novavax is a worldwide enterprise developing protein-based vaccines using its Matrix-M™ adjuvant technology.

news.headline: 2024 Ningbo Open begins on Oct. 14 in China, upgraded to WTA 500 event, partnering with WTA for first time.
news.summary: The 2024 Ningbo Open began on October 14 in NINGBO, China. This year, the event has been elevated to a WTA 500 tournament after collaborating with the Women's Tennis Association (WTA) last year. This upgrade highlights the growing significance of the tournament in the tennis world.

news.headline: Elysium Health™ launches VISION™ for eye health with guidance from Stanford University ophthalmologist. (Words: 20)
news.summary: Elysium Health, Inc., a prominent company specializing in longevity science, unveiled VISION, a product designed to enhance visual performance and promote eye health under the expertise of Dr. Theodore Leng from Stanford University. VISION aims to support eye health throughout all life stages. The announcement took place in New York on October 16, 2024.

news.headline: 1NCE wins 2024 Global Customer Value Leadership Award by Frost & Sullivan for IoT connectivity, serving 23,000+ customers managing 30M devices globally with a flat-rate subscription model.
news.summary: 1NCE has successfully provided affordable Internet of Things (IoT) connectivity and software solutions to over 23,000 customers who oversee 30 million devices worldwide. Their approach includes a unique flat-rate subscription model that streamlines operations specifically tailored for low-data IoT applications. The company operates in San Antonio, offering unparalleled services in the IoT sector.

news.headline: Rural King opens first store in GA in Bainbridge as part of 6 new stores in 2024. Celebrating rural lifestyle.
news.summary: Rural King, a family-owned retailer focusing on the rural lifestyle, is set to open six new stores in 2024. One of these locations will be in Bainbridge, GA. The grand opening of the Bainbridge store marks a significant milestone as it is the company's first store in that area. The announcement was made on Oct. 16, 2024, in Mattoon, Illinois. This expansion is a part of Rural King's ongoing commitment to reaching new markets and serving customers in more locations.

news.headline: Canadian House Starts, Annualized Actual 223.808k (Forecast 235k, Previous 217.4k)
Global Hydrogen Trucks Market to grow at 43.5% CAGR, hitting $62.45B by 2031 from $4.98B in 2024 due to clean fuel demand & environmental concerns.
news.summary: The global Hydrogen Trucks Market, valued at $4.98 billion in 2024, is expected to reach $62.45 billion by 2031. Major growth factors include rising investments by automakers in fuel cell technologies, with heavy-duty truck manufacturers like Toyota and Hyundai launching hydrogen-powered Class 8 trucks. The market is being driven by a push towards clean fuel vehicles to reduce carbon emissions, in line with government policies promoting zero-emission vehicles. Companies like Shell and Air Liquide are investing in hydrogen refueling stations to support the increasing adoption of hydrogen trucks. The market is poised to grow at a CAGR of 43.5%, with the development of green hydrogen production using renewable energy emerging as a key trend.

news.headline: Aquafeed market to reach $103.4B by 2031, up from $61.9B in 2022. Shift towards sustainable ingredients noted. Automation to enhance production efficiency and sustainability. Pellets & fish species to drive demand. North America leading consumer. Key players adopting expansion strategies.
news.summary: The global aquafeed market was valued at US$61.9 billion in 2022 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.9% between 2023 and 2031, reaching US$103.4 billion. Traditional marine proteins in aquafeed may be replaced with sustainable and alternative ingredients such as plant-based proteins, insect meal, and single-cell proteins. Aquafeed is being researched to improve nutritional content and enhance growth and health of farmed species, with precision feeding based on life stages. Automation and data analytics advancements may lead to more efficient and sustainable aquafeed production. The pellets segment is expected to drive demand, fish species to drive aquafeed demand, and health segment to create a market for aquafeed. North America is the largest consumer of aquafeed due to aquaculture and seafood production. Key players in the market include Cargill Inc., Koninklijke DSM N.V., BENEO GmbH, Sonac B.V., and others, who employ various expansion strategies to introduce new nutritious feeds for fish and aquatic animals.

news.headline: SurgiBox, Inc. receives patent in the Philippines, enhancing its global presence. Atif Rakin, CTO mentioned.
news.summary: SurgiBox, Inc., based in Cambridge, MA, has recently been granted a patent by the Intellectual Property Office of the Philippines (IPOPHL). This certificate of grant marks a significant achievement for the company in the field of portable surgical solutions. Atif Rakin, the Chief Technology Officer at SurgiBox, expressed pride in this accomplishment. The exact date of the patent issuance was October 16, 2024.

news.headline: Italy considering increasing Bitcoin capital gains tax to 42% from 26%, removing 750 million euro threshold for Digital Services Tax.
news.summary: Italy is considering increasing the withholding tax on Bitcoin capital gains to 42% and eliminating the previous 750 million euro minimum revenue threshold for the Digital Services Tax.

news.headline: Subway unveils spiciest sandwiches with new Ghost Pepper Bread, offering ghosters a chance to rekindle old flame.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, Subway has released the spiciest sandwiches in the brand's history. To mark this occasion, the fast-food chain is inviting customers to experience these fiery new offerings by giving them an exclusive opportunity for redemption. At an event in Miami on October 16, 2024, Subway announced the launch of these unprecedented menu items, which promise to tantalize taste buds like never before. This promotion is set to reignite the passion for loyal customers with a chance to reconnect with an old favorite flavor.
